# Shops Mobile Checklist (`shops.html`)

```md
- [ ] Filter chips (city, karat, verified) instead of dropdowns on mobile
- [ ] Each shop card: name, area, verified-tier badge, last-checked timestamp
- [ ] Verified-tier wording honest (`verified` / `listed` / `market cluster`)
- [ ] No "trusted by X customers" / "best price" / "official" claims without evidence
- [ ] Empty state when filters return zero results (with a "clear filters" CTA)
- [ ] Map view (if present) tappable + zoomable on mobile
- [ ] Contact actions use `safeTel()` for phone numbers
- [ ] Disclosure: "Listings are informational; we don't guarantee shop prices"
- [ ] Internal link to methodology
- [ ] Card overflow handled (long shop names don't break layout)
- [ ] RTL: cards stack correctly, badges mirror where appropriate
```
